puppet_strike.name: Puppet Strike
puppet_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A coordinated strike between you and your puppet. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Control Pip.

string_pull.name: String Pull
string_pull.description: Setup: Reposition your puppet or target. Generates 1 Control Pip and marks the target.

overdrive.name: Overdrive Protocol
overdrive.description: Payoff: Force your puppet into extreme performance. Consumes 5 Control Pips to increase puppet power by 100% for 5 ticks.

iron_fury.name: Iron Fury
iron_fury.description: Payoff: A violent series of strikes from your puppet. Consumes 3 Control Pips to deal Physical damage and apply [Staggered].

iron_guard.name: Iron Guard
iron_guard.description: Defense: Your puppet moves to intercept incoming damage. Reduces enemy hit chance to you by 40%.

proxy_defense.name: Proxy Defense
proxy_defense.description: Defense: Shift incoming damage to your puppet instead of yourself.

thread_dash.name: Thread Dash
thread_dash.description: Mobility: Slide across the room using your control strings as guidance.

grand_puppeteer.name: Grand Puppeteer
grand_puppeteer.description: Utility/Signature: Your next 5 non-signature blessings are repeated by your puppet for 0 cost.

puppet_master_physiology.name: Puppet Master Physiology
puppet_master_physiology.description: Passive: Puppet Synergy. Your puppets have 10% bonus HP and your Control generation is increased by 20% when stationary.
